summary: The session focused on technical support for a mobile app developed using WordPress and WooCommerce, addressing issues related to API functionality, user interface design, and client communication. The user, who is developing an eCommerce app, sought assistance in implementing a global filter for retrieving only in-stock items through the WooCommerce API and requested help in drafting a professional email to a client regarding project updates.
facts: The user is developing an eCommerce app using WordPress and WooCommerce. The user requested to apply a global filter on the WooCommerce API to retrieve only items in stock. The user received an email from a customer regarding the marketing material needed to publish the iOS version of the app. The user mentioned that the last fix was delivered by their team on Thursday, February 16. The user asked for assistance in drafting a professional email to the client to confirm support and request feedback on the latest APK. The user developed many APIs and wanted to apply the stock filter globally without modifying all APIs. The assistant provided a PHP function to filter products by stock status and explained how to implement it in a plugin.
